ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-04-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT BAUER'S INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SINAN HASAN BUSINESS ANALYST. DEFENDANT UNION LEASING INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ELLEN WATTS INS AGENT FOR UNION. DEFENDANT ELIJAH HAWINS IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON ELIJAH HAWKINS. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAR-04 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE MAR-04 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS THAT THE DEFENDANT WITHOUT SERVICE ELIJAH HAWKINS NOT BE DISMISSED UNTIL THE HEARING IF NO SERVICE HAS BEEN DONE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAWKINS III, ELIJAH (DRIVER)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-04-2020 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
